name: Nuclear Fuels Inc.
description: Nuclear Fuels Inc. is a uranium exploration and development company focused on advancing district-scale, In-Situ Recovery (ISR) amenable uranium projects toward production in the United States. Headquartered in Canada and listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE: NF), the company is dedicated to identifying and developing high-potential uranium assets in proven jurisdictions. By prioritizing projects like the Kaycee Project in Wyoming’s Powder River Basin, Nuclear Fuels Inc. aims to contribute to the energy sector by providing sustainable uranium resources essential for modern power generation and the global transition to clean energy.
